name: Mayor's Office of the General Counsel

attributes.description: Serves as principal legal advisor to the Mayor; reviews and evaluates all significant legal and policy initiatives and settlement proposals; designs and implements legal strategies for the termination of court imposed intervention into District operations; and coordinates legal, policy, and operational initiatives related to compliance with court orders and the transition from court intervention to government control.
attributes.shortName: Mayor's Office of the General Counsel
attributes.sourceHeading: Organizational Charts for Agencies and Offices Under the Mayor's Authority
